name: Belly Drum
effect: User deals Damage to itself equal to Half of its total HP rounded down. In addition, your max HP is reduced by 25% (Round Down) for the duration of the battle. For the rest of combat, raise the maximum Strength Stat Change for the User by 3 (to a maximum of +6). Increase the User's Strength by 3. The stat changes from Belly Drum cannot be stolen or passed to another, however if they are removed, the reduction in Max HP is removed as well.
description: The Pokemon Roars a war cry while hitting its Belly.
